---
name: ponytail-debt
description: >
  Track deliberate simplifications marked with ponytail comments. Collect
  them into a short debt ledger so teams can revisit only the shortcuts that
  matter.
---

# Ponytail Debt

Read `ponytail:` comments and turn them into a small actionable ledger.

## Capture

- Location
- Why shortcut exists
- Ceiling / upgrade trigger
- Owner if obvious

## Output

Group by theme. Keep only useful debt, not every comment.

Format:

`path: shortcut reason → revisit when [trigger]`
